title: Mark Carney secures majority government in Canada after special election win - The Guardian
summary_full: Mark Carney secures majority government in Canada after special election win  The GuardianIt’s the first day of Mark Carney’s majority era, what does that mean?  CTV NewsMichael Higgins: Beware an unchecked Mark Carney  National PostMeet Danielle Martin, the new Liberal MP for University—Rosedale  Toronto StarOpinion: Mark Carney finally has his majority. He must not waste it  The Globe and Mail
